CustomField.description: Will any samples be distributed? If so, identify the products to be sampled. *Please note that the provision of any samples must adhere to the country-specific Standards for Interactions with the Healthcare Community.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
If so, identify the products to be sampled.
*Please note that the provision of any samples must adhere to the country-specific Standards for Interactions with the Healthcare Community.
CustomField.label: will any samples details
